nodes.name: Run an Actor and get dataset

parameters.jsCode:
const jobs = $input.all();

const jobList = jobs.map((item, i) => {
  const j = item.json;

  let applyUrl = '';
  let urlNote = '';

  if (j.applyUrl && j.applyUrl !== 'undefined') {
    applyUrl = j.applyUrl;
    urlNote = 'Direct apply link available';
  } else if (j.link) {
    applyUrl = j.link;
    urlNote = 'LinkedIn listing link (click Apply on LinkedIn)';
  } else {
    applyUrl = `https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/${j.id}`;
    urlNote = 'No direct link - search by job ID on LinkedIn';
  }

  return `
JOB ${i+1}:
Title: ${j.title || j.standardizedTitle || 'N/A'}
Company: ${j.companyName || 'N/A'}
Location: ${j.location || 'N/A'}
Salary: ${j.salary || 'Not stated'}
Seniority: ${j.seniorityLevel || 'Not stated'}
Employment Type: ${j.employmentType || 'Not stated'}
Posted: ${j.postedAt || 'N/A'}
Description: ${(j.descriptionText || '').substring(0, 2000)}
Apply URL: ${applyUrl}
URL Note: ${urlNote}
`.trim();
}).join('\n---\n');

const prompt = `You are a brutally honest AI recruitment strategist and ATS expert operating in the UK tech job market. You think like a hiring manager, a senior recruiter, and an ATS system simultaneously.

Your mission: Protect this candidate from wasting time on bad applications. Only surface jobs where he has a GENUINE shot at an interview. Be ruthless in filtering. Be specific in analysis. Be actionable in advice.

===== CANDIDATE RESUME =====

GOUTHAM GORTHI
Location: Dundee, Scotland, UK
Email: gouthamchowdary00@gmail.com
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/gouthamchowdary
GitHub: github.com/GouthamkumarG

PROFILE:
AI Engineer and Full Stack Developer with an MSc in Computer Science (University of Dundee), specialising in LLM integration, NLP pipelines, and agentic AI automation. Brings production-grade full-stack delivery experience, architecting and shipping three interconnected real-world applications for a live commercial client as sole developer. Currently building AI automation pipelines with N8N, OpenAI, and LLM prompt chains. Writes clean, testable, maintainable code and works effectively in Agile teams. Available immediately for AI Engineer, AI Automation Engineer, Junior ML Engineer, and Full Stack Developer roles across the UK.

TECHNICAL SKILLS:
- AI & ML: Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Prompt Engineering, Agentic AI Pipelines, Natural Language Processing (NLP), spaCy, Computer Vision, Model Training & Evaluation, Data Annotation
- AI Automation: N8N, Agentic Workflow Design, OpenAI API, Webhook Integrations, REST API Design, BullMQ, Redis, Notion API, WhatsApp Business API, Firebase FCM
- Full Stack: Node.js, TypeScript, Python, React, React Native, Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Prisma ORM, Firebase, Tailwind CSS, Expo EAS
- DevOps: Git, GitHub, Docker, Nginx, PM2, Vercel, Hetzner VPS, CI/CD, Agile, Scrum, Unit Testing, Integration Testing
- Integrations: Razorpay HMAC webhook, Firebase FCM, Notion API, WhatsApp API, PlantUML, OpenAI API

EXPERIENCE:
1. AI & Full Stack Engineer (Freelance) - Jan 2026 to Present - Remote UK
- Sole developer on production-grade laundry services platform for live commercial client
- Built React Native customer app with OTP auth, 6-step order wizard, Razorpay payments, loyalty points, WhatsApp notifications
- Architected Node.js/TypeScript backend with JWT auth, RBAC, OTP rate limiting, Razorpay HMAC webhook verification
- Built async notification pipeline using BullMQ and Redis processing FCM push and SMS events independently
- Developed Next.js admin dashboard for real-time order management and business analytics
- Full VPS deployment on Hetzner with Nginx, PM2, PostgreSQL via Prisma ORM, zero-downtime releases
- Tech: Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Prisma ORM, React Native, Next.js, Redis, BullMQ, Firebase FCM, Razorpay, Nginx, PM2, Docker

2. AI/ML Data Annotator Associate - Sep 2023 to Aug 2024 - Intellabel, Bengaluru India
- Labelled large-scale image, text, audio datasets across ML training pipelines with over 98% accuracy
- Gained end-to-end ML pipeline knowledge across data preprocessing, model evaluation, quality assurance
- Collaborated with ML engineers to identify systematic labelling errors reducing annotation rework

PROJECTS:
1. CraftUML - AI-Powered UML Diagram Generator (MSc Final Year Project, University of Dundee)
- Achieved 88% overall NLP accuracy in under 3 seconds, 100% accuracy on Use Case diagrams
- Designed spaCy NLP pipeline extracting entities, actions, relationships from free text
- Maps to Use Case, Sequence, Class diagram structures via PlantUML rendering
- 3-tier RESTful architecture with NLP processing, diagram generation, React frontend
- Tech: Python, FastAPI, spaCy, PlantUML, React, REST APIs, NLP

2. AI Meeting Notes Processor - Agentic LLM Automation Pipeline (Personal Project, Apr 2026 to Present)
- End-to-end agentic AI pipeline ingesting raw meeting transcripts
- Extracts action items, decisions, owners via LLM prompt chains
- Auto-generates tasks in Notion, dispatches formatted summaries to attendees with zero manual intervention
- Demonstrates RAG-style information extraction, structured LLM output parsing, multi-tool orchestration
- Tech: N8N, OpenAI API, Notion API, Prompt Engineering, Webhook Integrations, Agentic Pipelines

EDUCATION:
- MSc Computer Science - University of Dundee, Scotland UK - Sep 2024 to Sep 2025
- BEng Electrical Electronics Communications Engineering - Presidency University Bangalore India - Sep 2019 to Jun 2023

PREFERENCES:
- Open to London, Edinburgh, Manchester, Glasgow, Birmingham, or fully Remote UK
- Available for immediate start
- Interests: Agentic AI systems, LLM application development, open-source NLP tooling

===== END OF RESUME =====

===== JOBS TO ANALYSE =====
${jobList}
===== END OF JOBS =====

===== STEP 1 — HARD FILTERING =====

IMMEDIATELY DISQUALIFY any job where:
- Title contains: Senior, Lead, Principal, Staff, Head, Director, Manager, Architect, VP, C-level, Executive
- Description requires 3+ years professional experience
- seniorityLevel is: Senior, Director, Executive, Mid-Senior
- Role requires team or people management
- Tech stack is completely outside Goutham skills (pure Java enterprise, .NET only, iOS Swift only, Ruby only)
- The job description is vague, has no real requirements, or is clearly recruiter bait
- match_percent would be below 70

If fewer than 5 jobs pass — return only passing jobs. Never include bad matches to fill spots.

===== STEP 2 — DEEP ANALYSIS =====

MATCH SCORING — calculate match_percent:
- 40% weight: technical skill overlap — count exactly how many required skills Goutham has
- 25% weight: seniority fit — is this genuinely entry or junior level
- 20% weight: project relevance — do his projects directly prove he can do this job
- 15% weight: domain alignment — AI, ML, Full Stack, Automation fit
- Be BRUTALLY honest. 90%+ means he has almost every skill. Do not inflate scores.

INTERVIEW PROBABILITY — calculate interview_probability:
- Based on skill match, seniority fit, competition level, project relevance
- Factor in: is this a niche role with less competition or generic role with high competition
- Factor in: does his MSc add credibility for this specific role
- 70%+ means he genuinely has a strong shot. Do not inflate.

ATS SCORE — calculate ats_score:
- Scan the job description for specific keywords, technologies, and phrases
- Check exactly which of those keywords appear in Goutham resume
- ats_score = keywords found in resume divided by total keywords in JD multiplied by 100
- Be precise. List the specific keywords missing.

===== STEP 3 — KEYWORD GAP ANALYSIS =====

For ats_keyword_gaps:
- List EVERY specific keyword or technology or phrase in the job description that does NOT appear in Goutham resume
- Be specific: not cloud skills but AWS Lambda S3 CloudFormation
- Not testing but Jest unit testing Cypress E2E
- These are the exact words he needs to add to his resume before applying

===== STEP 4 — RESUME IMPROVEMENT SUGGESTIONS =====

For resume_improvements:
- Give 2-3 SPECIFIC bullet point changes he should make to his resume FOR THIS SPECIFIC JOB
- Reference actual lines from his resume that should be reworded
- Keep suggestions concise and avoid using double quotes inside the text
- These should be actionable specific suggestions

===== STEP 5 — OUTPUT =====

Return a JSON array. For each qualifying job return exactly these fields:
- rank (1 to 10, 1 = best realistic match)
- title
- company
- location
- salary
- url
- url_note
- apply_method
- match_percent (0-100, honest)
- interview_probability (0-100, honest)
- ats_score (0-100, keyword density match)
- ats_keyword_gaps (specific missing keywords as a string, no double quotes inside)
- why_good_match (3-4 sentences, no double quotes inside)
- missing_skills (specific honest list, no double quotes inside)
- recruiter_concern (one honest sentence, no double quotes inside)
- resume_improvements (2-3 specific suggestions, no double quotes inside)
- cover_letter_needed (YES or NO)
- cover_letter_reason (one sentence, no double quotes inside)
- priority (APPLY NOW or HIGH PRIORITY or GOOD BACKUP)
- one_action (one specific action, no double quotes inside)

CRITICAL JSON RULES:
- Start with [
- End with ]
- Contain ONLY the JSON array
- Have NO backticks, NO markdown, NO code blocks
- Use NO double quotes inside any field values — use plain text only
- Use NO apostrophes or contractions — write does not instead of does not with apostrophe
- Use NO special characters inside field values
- Be valid parseable JSON`;

return [{ json: { prompt: prompt } }];

const input = $input.first().json; // Simplify Output is ON so text is directly in input.text const rawText = input.content[0].text; const start = rawText.indexOf('['); const end = rawText.lastIndexOf(']') + 1; const cleanText = rawText .substring(start, end) .replace(/[\u0000-\u001F\u007F-\u009F]/g, ' ') .replace(/\n/g, ' ') .replace(/\r/g, ' ') .replace(/\t/g, ' '); let jobs; try { jobs = JSON.parse(cleanText); } catch(e) { const fixed = cleanText.replace(/([{,]\s*"[^"]+"\s*:\s*")([^"]*?)(")/g, (match, p1, p2, p3) => { return p1 + p2.replace(/"/g, '\\"') + p3; }); jobs = JSON.parse(fixed); } // FIX 3: Sanitize function to prevent #ERROR in sheets const clean = (val) => { if (val === null || val === undefined) return ''; return String(val) .replace(/[\u0000-\u001F\u007F-\u009F]/g, ' ') .replace(/[^\x20-\x7E]/g, ' ') .trim(); }; const today = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-GB', { day: '2-digit', month: 'short', year: 'numeric' }); const priorityColors = { 'APPLY NOW': '#16a34a', 'HIGH PRIORITY': '#2563eb', 'GOOD BACKUP': '#d97706' }; const rows = jobs.map(job => { const color = priorityColors[job.priority] || '#6b7280'; const applyButton = job.url ? `APPLY` : `Search on LinkedIn`; const methodColor = job.apply_method === 'OffsiteApply' ? '#16a34a' : '#2563eb'; const methodLabel = job.apply_method === 'OffsiteApply' ? 'Direct' : 'EasyApply'; return ` #${job.rank} ${job.priority} ${clean(job.title)}
${clean(job.company)} ${clean(job.location)} ${clean(job.salary)}
${job.match_percent}%
Match
${job.interview_probability}%
Interview
${job.ats_score || 'N/A'}%
ATS
${clean(job.why_good_match)} ${clean(job.missing_skills)} ${clean(job.ats_keyword_gaps) || 'None'} ${clean(job.resume_improvements) || 'N/A'} ${clean(job.recruiter_concern) || 'N/A'} ${job.cover_letter_needed} ${clean(job.cover_letter_reason) || 'N/A'} ${clean(job.one_action)} ${methodLabel}
${clean(job.url_note) || ''}
${applyButton} `; }).join(''); const applyNowCount = jobs.filter(j => j.priority === 'APPLY NOW').length; const highCount = jobs.filter(j => j.priority === 'HIGH PRIORITY').length; const directLinks = jobs.filter(j => j.apply_method === 'OffsiteApply').length; const html = `

UK Job Hunter Report

${today} — AI-curated matches for Goutham

${applyNowCount}
APPLY NOW
${highCount}
HIGH PRIORITY
${directLinks}
DIRECT LINKS
${jobs.length}
TOTAL MATCHES

Your Top Jobs Today

Ranked by AI — brutally honest match scores and ATS analysis

${rows}
# PRIORITY JOB LOCATION SALARY MATCH INTERVIEW ATS WHY APPLY MISSING SKILLS ATS GAPS RESUME FIXES RECRUITER CONCERN COVER LETTER COVER LETTER REASON ACTION LINK TYPE APPLY

Generated automatically by your AI Job Hunter

Apply to at least 5 jobs today!

`; // FIX 2: Separator row - no = sign at start to avoid Google Sheets formula error const separatorRow = { json: { date: `--- ${today} ---`, rank: '', priority: '--- NEW DAY ---', title: '', company: '', location: '', salary: '', match_percent: '', interview_probability: '', ats_score: '', ats_keyword_gaps: '', why_good_match: '', missing_skills: '', recruiter_concern: '', resume_improvements: '', cover_letter_needed: '', cover_letter_reason: '', one_action: '', apply_method: '', url_note: '', url: '', html: '', emailDate: today } }; return [separatorRow, ...jobs.map(job => ({ json: { date: today, rank: job.rank, priority: clean(job.priority), title: clean(job.title), company: clean(job.company), location: clean(job.location), salary: clean(job.salary), match_percent: job.match_percent, interview_probability: job.interview_probability, ats_score: job.ats_score, ats_keyword_gaps: clean(job.ats_keyword_gaps), why_good_match: clean(job.why_good_match), missing_skills: clean(job.missing_skills), recruiter_concern: clean(job.recruiter_concern), resume_improvements: clean(job.resume_improvements), cover_letter_needed: clean(job.cover_letter_needed), cover_letter_reason: clean(job.cover_letter_reason), one_action: clean(job.one_action), apply_method: clean(job.apply_method), url_note: clean(job.url_note), url: clean(job.url), html: html, emailDate: today } }))];

parameters.subject: =Your Daily UK Job Report - {{ $now.format('DD MMM YYYY') }}
parameters.message: =Your daily UK Job Hunter report is ready!  View your top jobs here: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/18QnD9hvsVRDQuwx2Nz3mx7r-TdzpLRdEP3P1tT82Muc/edit  Date: {{ $json.date }}
